rawText: The capital of France has been Paris since its liberation in 1944.
query: what is the capital of france

rawText: The blue color of the sky is due to Rayleigh scattering, which sends more higher frequency shorter wavelength (blue) sunlight into the eye observer than other frequencies wavelength. This phenomenon occurs because the blueness of clear air in Earth's atmosphere is due to Rayleigh scattering by nitrogen and oxygen molecules. While Rayleigh scattering explains the blue hue, looking toward the horizon, sunlight of all wavelengths (colors) will generally undergo Mie scattering from suspended particles.
